case_title: BBNR, LLC VS. ADAMA LAND DEVELOPMENT, LLC

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-18-2021 CONTINUED TO DEC-22-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF LANCE BATES IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 67063268) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BBNR, LLC A NEVADA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BBNR, LLC A NEVADA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADAMA LAND DEVELOPMENT, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $5,904.47 PRINCIPAL, $339.71 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,244.18, SEE SCANNED DOC - FURTHERMORE, THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF AS FOLLOWS: (1) THE CONTRACT FOR SALE WRITTEN AGREEMENT, DATED JUNE 23, 2014, (THE "AGREEMENT") BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, OBLIGATES DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE, AND ENTITLES PLAINTIFF TO RESERVE, THE EASEMENT DEFINED IN THE AGREEMENT AND IN THE GRANT DEED RECORDED IN THE OFFICE OF THE COUNTY RECORDER OF YUBA COUNTY ON FEBRUARY 26, 2021, AS DOCUMENT 2021-003275 ("GRANT DEED") FOR THE GRANT OF REAL PROPERTY DEFINED IN THE GRANT DEED (THE "PROPERTY"); (2) DEFENDANT ACCEPTED THE GRANT DEED; AND (3) THE EASEMENT RESERVED IN THE GRANT DEED FOR THE PROPERTY COMPLIES WITH THE AGREEMENT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-26-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2022 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2021 Continued To Jan-26-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Dec-14-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Adama Land Development LLC, a California limited liability company.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:32 a.m.

Michael E. Chase, Esq. and Eric Miller, Esq. appeared for plaintiff BBNR, LLC, a Nevada limited liability company.
Lance Bates, Managing Member for BBNR, LLC, was placed under oath and testified.
Messrs. Bates, Chase and Miller appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Adama Land Development LLC, a California limited liability company.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract and Request for Declaratory Relief was filed on March 16, 2021.
Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint for Breach of Contract and Request for Declaratory Relief was filed on March 25, 2021.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, First Amended Complaint and accompanying documents on defendant Adama Land Development, LLC's Registered Agent of Process occurred on April 29, 2021 and was effectuated on May 10, 2021.
Default as to defendant Adama Land Development LLC, a California limited liability company, was entered on June 11, 2021.
No DOE defendants were named in plaintiff's First Amended Complaint.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff BBNR, LLC, a Nevada limited liability company, and against the defaulted defendant Adama Land Development, LLC, a California limited liability company, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $5,904.47.
Prejudgment Interest - $339.71.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $908.70.

Total - $7,152.88.

Furthermore, the Court GRANTS plaintiff's request for Declaratory Relief as follows:

(1) The Contract for Sale written agreement, dated June 23, 2014, (the "Agreement") between Plaintiff and Defendant, obligates Defendant to provide, and entitles Plaintiff to reserve, the easement defined in the Agreement and in the Grant Deed recorded in the office of the County Recorder of Yuba County on February 26, 2021, as document 2021-003275 ("Grant Deed") for the grant of real property defined in the Grant Deed (the "Property");
(2) Defendant accepted the Grant Deed; and
(3) The easement reserved in the Grant Deed for the Property complies with the Agreement.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Proceedings concluded at 10:59 a.m.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2021 Continued To Dec-22-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
